name: label-drape-osm-buildings-nyc
description: Load a 3D tileset and drape an imagery layer on the tileset rather than the globe. Uses lower Manhattan for visual recognizability.
prompt: Create a CesiumJS viewer over lower Manhattan with OSM Buildings loaded. Then add a label-style imagery layer and drape it onto the 3D buildings tileset rather than the globe, using the tileset.imageryLayers collection. Position the camera at a city-overview angle so the buildings are clearly visible.
expected_behaviors: Loads OSM Buildings or another 3D tileset
visual_expectations: A recognizable 3D Manhattan scene with visible building massing. The draped imagery may appear as labels or raster detail over the 3D tileset.
